productDisplayName: Lotto Men Carioca ID Black Shoes
description: This lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun Fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park.UpperWater repellent premium plus upper and suede toe cap for great touch and durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fitCushioned footbed for shock absorptionBranding on the sides, at the back of the collar and on the tongueEVA cushioned insole for comfortOutsoleThe outsole is stitched to the upper to increase the longevityThe non-marking rubber outsole gives excellent stability and gripshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
